comment: Minimal-but-complete contract for a fictional 1-camera arm. LOAD-BEARING: every feature needs `role` (splits obs vs action); image observations need `type` in {rgb,bgr,gray,depth} or they're mistaken for the state. Everything else (control_rate, dtype, shape, names) is DESCRIPTIVE — not enforced — but include it so the trace viewer can label/display your obs and action slices. Feature keys must match VERBATIM the keys your bridge returns from get_observation (and `action` is the single action feature). Full field reference: https://docs.hud.ai/v6/core/robots#the-contract
